title: 'My Work' Keyboard Shortcut
excerpt:
It would be nice to have a keyboard shortcut to switch to the My Work view. 
Just like we have CTRL + B to pull up a board search. 
Maybe like CTRL + M to open up my work.

posts.author: DGallagher (Don Gallagher)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice to have a keyboard shortcut to switch to the My Work view.
Just like we have CTRL + B to pull up a board search.
Maybe like CTRL + M to open up my work.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That would be great! Have you submitted it as a feature request?

posts.author: Lumexx (Marco Medina)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah I really like this idea also could we get a keyboard shortcut to search in “My Work” I am on mac / chrome browser and if I select command + F or command + G they don’t work in the “My Work” section.

posts.author: Lumexx (Marco Medina)
posts.cookedHtml: Have we gotten an update about this feature?
